commit.message:
v3: Search box interaction + API interception + multi-strategy fallback

Key changes from Round 9 learnings:
- ByteDance: URL params no longer work, switch to search box interaction
- Tencent: Add API response interception (page.on("response")) for structured JSON
- Bilibili: New dedicated extractor with domcontentloaded + 15s wait
- Feishu portals: Extract JD from listing page cards (detail pages have login wall)
- Add 3 new difficulty sections (#9 search box, #10 API intercept, #11 feishu detail)
- Update platform difficulty table with real test results
- Fix lesson #3: search box > URL params > keyword matching

commit.message:
fix: 거짓 성공(false positive) 제거 및 assertion 정직화

- CLAUDE.md 추가: AI 코딩 규칙 (assertion에 .catch 금지 등)
- KPA-026: 유료 회차 → 기다무 뱃지 회차 탐색으로 변경
- package.json: test:ui에 rm -rf allure-results 추가

1단계 - 항상 참인 assertion 수정 (5건):
  - kpa-034: expect(deleted || true) → 확인 팝업 처리 + 폴링 검증
  - kpa-032/033: toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0) → (1)
  - kpa-052: .catch 제거 + >= 1

2단계 - expect().catch(() => null) 제거 (24건, 13개 파일):
  kpa-020/027/037/038/039/040/041/042/043/044/046/049/070/102

실패 수정 (5건):
  - KPA-020: 수동 polling → expect().toBeVisible()
  - KPA-034/039: 확인 팝업도 성공 조건에 포함
  - KPA-044: 편집 모드에서 링크 없는 경우 처리
  - KPA-046: 선물 없으면 test.skip 처리

commit.message:
fix: replace staleness filter with GAS cross-validation for ghost drivers

Ghost driver detection now uses the actual Google Sheet data (source of truth)
instead of timestamp staleness. Both APK and PWA cross-validate Firebase
drivers against GAS getLiveOperations — drivers not in active sheet shifts
are removed after a 90s grace period. PWA polls GAS every 30s.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add chat mute system (#499)

## Summary

- Adds `chatMutes?: PlayerBan[]` field to `PlayerModel` (same shape as
existing `bans`)
- Implements `addChatMute` and `revokeChatMute` business logic with
typed event emission
- Adds `hasActiveChatMute()` pure helper with full unit test coverage
- Enforces mute check in `chat/send.ts` — muted players get a 403 error
- Admin UI: new **Chat mutes** tab on the player edit page (list +
inline revoke + add form)
- Chat input is disabled with placeholder "you are currently muted" for
muted players

## Test plan

- [ ] All unit tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` and `pnpm build` pass
- [ ] As admin, navigate to `/players/:steamId/edit/chat-mutes` and add
a mute
- [ ] As muted player, verify the chat input is disabled with correct
placeholder
- [ ] Verify muted player cannot post messages (403 on form submit)
- [ ] As admin, revoke a mute inline — verify it updates in place
- [ ] Verify expired mutes are shown as inactive and cannot be revoked
again

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Ersetzt socket.emit('start_agent_chat') im Frontend durch
socket.emit('send_message', {content:'Hallo', agent_id}) — nutzt
den bewährten handle_message-Pfad, der korrekte Message-History
aufbaut und 400-Fehler bei OpenRouter verhindert.

commit.message:
fix(setup): Kismet source build for Parrot, FiraCode font permission fix

Kismet prebuilt packages (Parrot, trixie, kali repos) all depend on
libwebsockets17 which Parrot 7.x doesn't ship (has libwebsockets19).
Added _install_kismet_from_source() as fallback — builds from GitHub
with system libwebsockets-dev. Also fixed FiraCode Nerd Font install:
mktemp creates root-owned file, unzip as SETUP_USER got permission
denied. Added chmod a+r before unzip.

commit.message:
Add Hungry Monster game — face/mouth controlled, mobile-first

- hungry.html: 6th game using MediaPipe FaceMesh mouth open/close detection
- Open mouth wide to eat falling food (pizza, burger, donut, cake, star etc.)
- Keep mouth CLOSED to dodge chillies and bombs — lose a life if eaten
- Catch radius scales with how wide the mouth opens (bigger mouth = bigger zone)
- Devil horn monster overlay drawn using face bounding box landmarks
- Dashed green catch-zone circle visible when mouth is open
- 3 lives, 60 seconds, 6 food types earns level-up, difficulty ramps per level
- 3 new sounds in sounds.js: crunch (crispy layered eat), chilli-ouch (burn/pain), life-lost (dramatic)
- Card added to index.html with "Works great on mobile!" badge
- hungry pages added to GA4 stats tracking

commit.message:
feat: calculadora TDEE avanzada con wizard de 4 pasos

Wizard conversacional que guía al usuario por cuerpo, actividad
diaria, ejercicio y objetivo para calcular su TDEE de forma
precisa y educativa.

- utils/tdee.js: Mifflin-St Jeor (1990) + Katch-McArdle si hay
  % grasa. PAL calculado desde preguntas concretas (trabajo +
  pasos + días de ejercicio × MET × duración). 3 tablas de
  ritmos para perder/ganar.
- TDEECalculator.jsx: 4 pasos + pantalla resultado con count-up
  en los números grandes. Slide animation entre pasos. Portal a
  document.body. Bottom sheet en móvil, modal centrado en desktop.
  Historial de últimos 3 cálculos en localStorage.
- Resultado: desglose BMR + actividad + ejercicio, objetivo según
  ritmo elegido, tabla de alternativas (pérdida), macros con
  barras de porcentaje, warning de mínimo saludable.
- Guardar: actualiza target_calories + macros + tdee/bmr/pal en
  perfil. Refresca datos en Dashboard y Profile sin recargar.
- Dashboard: botón Calcular TDEE abre el wizard en lugar de
  navegar a otra página.
- Profile: botón ⚡ Calcular TDEE junto al campo de kcal objetivo.
- Worker profile.js: acepta tdee, bmr, pal_factor, formula_used,
  tdee_calculated_at con fallback progresivo.
- D1: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN tdee/bmr/pal_factor/
  formula_used/tdee_calculated_at.

Verificación: hombre 25a 175cm 75kg escritorio 5k pasos
4 días gym 1h pesas → TDEE ~2.450-2.550 kcal ✓

- Transactions support both cash and bank entries for income and expenses
- Expenses page replaced with full analysis dashboard:
  - Summary stats (total expenses, income, net flow, count)
  - Expense by category with bar charts and percentages
  - Income by category breakdown
  - 6-month trend chart (income vs expense bars)
  - Payment mode breakdown with visual cards
  - Top 10 expenses list
- Period filter: This Month, Last Month, 3/6 Months, This Year, All Time
- Contracts and Auto-Tag tabs preserved as-is

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: rollback active states instead of auto-advancing forward

When an agent exits leaving a beat in an active state (e.g. shipment),
the take loop now rolls back to the queue state for that step instead
of advancing forward. This prevents silently promoting work that wasn't
completed. The failed agent is excluded from pool selection so a
different agent retries the step.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add voiceover segments with temporal offsets (atrim + adelay)

Support cutting a single voiceover file into segments positioned
at specific points in the video timeline. Uses FFmpeg atrim for
cutting and adelay for positioning, with sidechain ducking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add Vents: anonymous globe messaging as new homepage

Vents lets visitors send anonymous, ephemeral messages (280 chars) that
rise as glowing bubbles from their geographic location on a 3D wireframe
globe. Real-time via SSE, with geolocation fallback chain, shadow
moderation, and IP rate limiting. Blog moves to /letters with 308
redirects from old /posts/ URLs.

fix: use rust-optimizer 0.15.1 (Rust 1.75) with pre-generated lock file

LLVM always emits memory.copy regardless of target-feature flags.
Rust 1.75's LLVM doesn't emit bulk-memory ops at all.
Pre-generate Cargo.lock with Rust 1.75 and copy into each contract.

Operational, Financial), add rich results visualization with SVG
compliance timeline chart, risk heatmap, severity badges, confidence
bands, and cost estimates, and integrate the Ephemeris dark/light
theme system throughout all scenario builder UI.

registry pattern for extensible dispatch. Frontend: collapsible
category palette with search, enhanced pipeline blocks, completely
rebuilt results panel.
